Equip: Chance to strike your ranged target with a Venom Shot for 31 to 45 Nature damage.
Chance on hit: Poisons target for 7 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 sec.
(2) Set: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
(3) Set: Increases damage done by Nature spells and effects by up to 14.
(3) Set: Increases healing done by spells and effects by up to 22.
(5) Set: When your health drops below 35%, you rapidly heal 90 health over 5 sec. This effect can trigger only once every 3 min.
(6) Set: Your Cat Form seems to react to the full embrace of the Viper.
Use: Teaches you how to craft a Deviate Scale Cloak.
Requires Deviate Scale (8), Cured Light Hide, Fine Thread
Use: Teaches you how to craft Deviate Scale Gloves.
Requires Perfect Deviate Scale (2), Deviate Scale (6), Fine Thread (2)
Use: Teaches you how to craft a Deviate Scale Belt.

Use: When applied to your fishing pole, increases Fishing by 50 for 10 min.
Use: When applied to your fishing pole, increases Fishing by 100 for 10 minutes.
Chance on hit: A burst of energy fills the caster, increasing his damage by 10 and armor by 150 for 15 sec.
Chance on hit: Heals wielder of 78 damage over 12 sec.
Use: Teaches you how to cook a Savory Deviate Delight.
Use: Your size is increased and your Strength goes up by 8 to match your new size.  Lasts 2 min.
Use: Teaches you how to make an Elixir of Giant Growth.
Use: Your size is increased and your Strength goes up by 8 to match your new size.  Lasts 2 min.
Requires Deviate Fish, Earthroot, Empty Vial
Use: The dynamite for Non-Engineers that nearly always gets to the target!  Inflicts 51 to 69 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.

Use: Restores 1392 health over 30 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.

Chance on hit: Corrosive acid that deals 7 Nature damage every 3 sec and lowers target's armor by 50 for 30 sec.

Use: Allows control of a mechanical target for a short time.  It may not always work and may just root the machine or make it very very angry.  Gnomish engineering at its finest.

Use: This container needs to be filled with water from the watering hole near Brine's hut in the Barrens.

"Adorably fierce and dusted with sugar. Eat it before it flies away!"

Use: Permanently increase the armor value of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet by 32 and Stamina by 4. Only usable on items level 25 and above.

Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"The queen had three kittens. The first gave her a juicy rat. The second, a tasty hare. And the white, her favorite, presented the head of her rival."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Known for its blue eyes. Also considered a delicacy by giant murlocs."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Old Alterac saying: 'A cat has nine lives, but needs only one.'"
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Favored pet of the Defias pirates, this colorful bird is handy for remembering passwords, grocery lists, and cracker recipes."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"The jungle trolls train these birds to mimic calls for help in order to lure unsuspecting travelers into traps."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Once bred and raised by the green dragon Itharius, this unique breed of dragon has settled in the jungles of Feralas."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Hailing from the Wetlands, this young dragon is just learning how to hunt, breathe fire, and go on cute destructive rampages."
Use: Brings a dead player back to life with 15% of their health and mana.  Cannot be used when in combat.

Use: Restores 2934 mana over 30 sec.  Must remain seated while drinking.

Use: Increases resistance to shadow by 10.  If an enemy strikes the imbiber, the attacker has a 30% chance of being inflicted with disease that increases their damage taken by 8 for 3 min.  Lasts for 30 min.
Use: Restores 1 to 1500 health and 1 to 1500 mana.
Use: Shows the location of all nearby undead on the minimap for 1 hour.

Use: Gives the imbiber invisibility for 18 sec.
